title: Pink Diamonds Texture Pack
description: Turns all diamond related items to pink!
body:
Simple texture pack that turns all diamond items to <font color=#FB00FF>**pink**</font> including armor, tools, blocks, ores and animal armors.

Enchantment glint also changed to a red color. *(there is an available version without the glint color change)

**If you want the <font color=#FF0000>red enchantment glint</font> only be sure to checkout the seperate resource pack [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/red-enchantment)**
